---
title: "Breaking the Air–Water Paradigm: Ion Behavior at Hydrophobic Solid–Water Interfaces"
author: ["Xavi R. Advincula","Kara D. Fong","Yongkang Wang","Christoph Schran","Mischa Bonn","Angelos Michaelides","Yair Litman"]
date: 2026-04-01
publication: "J. Am. Chem. Soc. **148**, 12753–12763 (2026)"
categories: ["aqueous_interfaces", "vibrational_spectroscopy"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1021/jacs.5c20209
url_preprint:
journ: "J. Am. Chem. Soc."
issue: 148
page: "12753-12763"
year: 2026
pub_number: 32
image: featured.webp
---
